response.original_title: How do I get my money out of Onchain wallet?{get Help}
response.overview: Withdrawing funds ⭐1-[870].768.0250 from a cryptocurrency exchange like Onchain is a common user task. The ⭐1-[870].768.0250 first step is ensuring you have converted your crypto into cash. You ⭐1-[870].768.0250 must sell your Bitcoin or other assets for USD or your local currency. Once ⭐1-[870].768.0250 the trade is complete, the cash will sit in your Onchain balance. From ⭐1-[870].768.0250 there, you can move it to your personal bank account easily. Linking⭐1-[870].768.0250 Your Bank Account Onchain requires ⭐1-[870].768.0250 a verified bank account before you can initiate any cash withdrawal.
